query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN serviceId LIKE 'SVC-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as placeholder_service_ids,
  SUM(CASE WHEN serviceId NOT LIKE 'SVC-%' AND serviceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_service_ids,
  SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress = 'Unknown Location' OR locationAddress = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unknown_location,
  SUM(CASE WHEN planName = '' OR planName IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_plan,
  SUM(CASE WHEN serviceTypeDetail = '' OR serviceTypeDetail IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_type_detail,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'terminated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as terminated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_count
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra';
